title: Prefer np.nonzero over np.where when only the condition parameter is set
description: Using np.where with a single condition can be less readable and less efficient than using np.nonzero.
message: Prefer np.nonzero over np.where with a single condition
recommendation: Use np.nonzero instead of np.where when only the condition parameter is set

noncompliant.code:
import numpy as np
arr = np.where(arr > 0, 1, 0)
noncompliant.description: Uses np.where with a single condition

compliant.code:
import numpy as np
arr = np.nonzero(arr > 0)

why_is_this_an_issue: np.where with a single condition can be less readable and less efficient than np.nonzero
how_to_fix: Replace np.where with a single condition with np.nonzero

metadata.title: Prefer np.nonzero over np.where when only the condition parameter is set
